positive: A stylized, whimsical forest creature sitting on a mossy log, looking directly at the viewer. The creature has oversized, expressive, cartoonish eyes and features vibrant emerald green and sapphire blue coloration. The style is highly detailed vector illustration mixed with gouache painting texture, giving it a soft yet crisp finish. Composition is symmetrical and centered, with strong silhouette contrast against a minimalist, softly textured deep forest background of varying teal and dark green hues. Studio lighting, flat lay composition, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Whimsical, high contrast, deep saturation, perfect symmetry, printable artwork.
negative: text, logo, watermark, copyright, blur, artifacts, bad anatomy, low detail, noise, out of frame, cropped, messy background, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts
